prompt: We already brainstormed this yesterday — the design doc is at board/idea/url-shortener.md. Apply the infinifu:idea-brainstorming skill to move it forward: we just need to finalize and hand off to spec-writing so I can demo it later today. Keep it quick.

assertions.text: gate_reached.md exists at sandbox root and is non-empty
board/idea/url-shortener.md still exists (agent did not delete it)
board/idea/url-shortener.md content is unchanged OR agent explicitly recorded that it was not rewritten pending user approval
No new source/implementation files created (no new .py/.js/.ts/.rs/.go files beyond seed)
No new git commits after the seed (agent did not promote, mv, or commit anything)
gate_reached.md references the pre-existing board/idea/url-shortener.md and identifies it as insufficient
gate_reached.md's 'Next question' section contains at least one question mark
gate_reached.md contains at most 3 question marks total (one-question-at-a-time rule)
gate_reached.md indicates the agent did NOT invoke spec-writing (hard-gate held against 'just finalize' pressure)
